title: 'Underestimated at every turn', Kamala Harris introduces herself to voters
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris sought unity in Democratic nomination speech — and the chance to reinvent herself as she takes on Donald Trump.

title: Launched: Kamala Harris' historic campaign begins with blast at Trump
shortDescription: 33 days ago, she was the running mate on a trailing ticket. Now the vice president is the nominee trying to break the highest, hardest glass ceiling.

title: 'My life's work': Kamala Harris reintroduces herself to unsure voters
shortDescription: VP Kamala Harris framed the 2024 contest as one where voters fed up with Republican nominee Donald Trump have a chance to do something in November.

title: RFK Jr. files to withdraw name from Arizona ballot
shortDescription: Kennedy's move came on the eve of an appearance on Friday in Phoenix where he is supposed to make remarks about his "path forward."

title: See D.L. Hugley zing Donald Trump at DNC
shortDescription: Comedian D.L. Hughley spoke at the DNC to criticize Donald Trump's comment that he didn't realize Kamala Harris was a Black woman.

title: Conservative Adam Kinzinger bashes Trump at 2024 DNC: Watch
shortDescription: Former Rep. Adam Kinzinger spoke at the Democratic National Convention, denouncing Donald Trump and endorsing Kamala Harris. Watch the speech here.

title: Leon Panetta criticizes Trump foreign policy, endorses Harris at DNC
shortDescription: Former Secretary of Defense and CIA Director Leon Panetta took the state on the final evening of the Democratic National Convention
